name: 示例 · 柔白浴袍套图
description: 授权采集示例：请替换为真实模版名称、构图说明与图片文件。

shots.label: 模特 · 浴室
shots.promptBody: Create an Amazon-style e-commerce product image based on the primary product photo. PRIMARY IMAGE is the ground-truth product photo. Preserve EXACT product identity with photoreal fidelity. Keep exact pattern/print, colors, collar/trim, belt/accessories, pockets and fabric texture from the primary photo. Do NOT invent a different print or colorway. Do NOT invent logos or brand marks. Prefer under-stylizing over inventing details. Only use product references from THIS job. Composition brief: 真人模特穿着本品浴袍坐在明亮现代浴室化妆台边，自然日光，电商生活方式构图，产品嵌入感强。 Photoreal embedding: natural fabric weight, soft contact shadows, believable folds, correct scale/perspective, scene-matched lighting. Must NOT look like a flat cutout pasted onto a background. CRITICAL: Absolutely NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos, brand marks, Chinese/English overlays, marketplace branding, or material callouts anywhere.

fidelityRules: 正面主图为唯一产品真相来源
禁止不同 SKU 印花混用参考
禁止画面出现品牌字 / 平台名 / 材质卖点叠字
印花、颜色、领型、腰带、口袋必须跟随正面主图
